## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy and content creation approach for Udemy Business (UB), integrating GrowthX's expertise with UB's existing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [UB lacks dedicated SEO support; Justin is spearheading efforts to build a content strategy and keyword universe](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach aligns well with UB's needs, focusing on creating a unique content experience for the business subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [The content will live on business.udemy.com/blog, not a separate subdomain, to avoid SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Leveraging Udemy's vast course data and transcripts presents significant opportunities for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

## Topics

### UB's Current SEO Status

  - [Justin started in May, first dedicated SEO support for UB](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Focusing on un-gating some content for SEO value while maintaining lead gen](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Created a scorecard and keyword universe based on sales call transcript analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Top priorities: AI transformation and technical upskilling](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Only one part-time (70%) dedicated writer (Jay) for UB content](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Consumer side has a separate writer working on "lecture articles" from course transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Need to scale content production significantly](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

### GrowthX's Approach

  - [Developing rich context through artifacts and feedback loops](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
  - [Using AI for content creation with a focus on quality and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=2929.0)
  - [Creating a cohesive theme and narrative (e.g., "building AI-native teams")](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Leveraging Udemy's course data and transcripts for unique insights](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Focus on line-of-business leaders rather than L\&D (needs confirmation from Jennifer)](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Aim for content that speaks to all personas initially, avoiding too much specificity](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Consider starting with "AI readiness" as a broad, relevant theme](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Content will live on business.udemy.com/blog, not a separate subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Need to address page load speed issues on the UB site](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Potential for unique UX/design within the main UB site structure](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=3432.0)

### Data Utilization Opportunities

  - [Access to course transcripts and tags can inform content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [Potential to analyze successful UB customers' usage patterns for tailored content and experiences](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add Justin to the GrowthX Notion space and Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=4150.0)
  - [Justin to review GrowthX's project brief and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=3195.0)
  - [Align on MVP content strategy and prioritize initial topics](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=3602.0)
  - [Explore how to leverage Udemy's course data and transcripts in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Address technical limitations and possibilities with the UB development team](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=3442.0)
  - [Schedule a demo of GrowthX's content creation platform for the UB team](https://fathom.video/share/zXoMuXYLYxme6TAY61RQnpgJh1zfS_aa?tab=summary&timestamp=3962.0)
